about.metaDescription: Learn about Dociva — free, fast, and secure online file tools for PDFs, images, video, and text. No registration required.
about.title: About Dociva
about.missionText: Dociva was built to make professional-grade file tools accessible to everyone — for free. We believe that converting, compressing, and editing documents should be simple, fast, and private. No sign-ups, no hidden fees, no software to install.
about.technologyText: Our platform is powered by modern cloud infrastructure designed for speed and reliability. Files are processed server-side using industry-leading open-source libraries, ensuring accurate conversions and high-quality output every time. Our AI-powered tools leverage advanced machine learning models for intelligent document analysis, translation, and summarization.
about.securityText: Security is built into every layer of our platform. All file transfers are encrypted via HTTPS. Uploaded files are validated, size-limited, and processed in isolated environments. We employ rate limiting and input sanitization to prevent abuse.
about.privacyText: Your files belong to you. We never read, share, or sell the content of your documents. All uploaded and processed files are automatically deleted from our servers within {{minutes}} minutes. No human eyes ever see your data — processing is fully automated.

pricingTransparency.metaTitle: Dociva Pricing Transparency — How Credits & Costs Work
pricingTransparency.metaDescription: Understand how Dociva credits work, what stays fixed, what can vary by workload, and why credits are not tied to a fixed number of provider requests.
pricingTransparency.title: How credit pricing works at Dociva
pricingTransparency.subtitle: We want your balance to reflect real processing effort, not an arbitrary transaction counter. This page explains what is fixed, what can vary, and what you see before you run a task.
pricingTransparency.creditsBody: Free and Pro accounts receive a credit allocation for each 30-day window. Your balance decreases only when a task is accepted.
pricingTransparency.quoteTitle: You see the price before heavy jobs run
pricingTransparency.quoteBody: For supported heavy and AI tools, Dociva can show a quote before execution so you can decide with context.
pricingTransparency.fairnessTitle: Not every task should cost the same
pricingTransparency.fairnessBody: Merging a PDF and translating a long document do not consume the same resources. Credit pricing reflects that difference.
pricingTransparency.howBody: Light and medium tools usually keep a fixed credit cost. Heavy and AI tools can use a dynamic quote based on the file size or processing workload expected before the task is queued.
pricingTransparency.fixedBody: Tasks like simple PDF edits or small conversions keep a predictable, low cost so common workflows stay easy to budget.
pricingTransparency.dynamicBody: Resource-heavy tasks such as OCR, compression, or AI-assisted document workflows may cost more when the file or workload is larger.
pricingTransparency.noteTitle: What we want to be explicit about
pricingTransparency.noteBody: Your site credits are a product balance for Dociva usage. They are not a direct token meter from our infrastructure providers.
pricingTransparency.noOneToOneBody: There is no fixed rule such as "1 credit = X Gemini requests." Some jobs make one provider call, some make several, and some AI-priced workflows do not rely on a single provider at all.
pricingTransparency.exampleLightBody: A lightweight tool such as merging or rotating a PDF stays near the minimum price because the processing burden is low and predictable.
pricingTransparency.exampleHeavyBody: OCR, compression, or background removal may cost more because file size and computation time increase the real workload.
pricingTransparency.exampleAiBody: Chat, summarization, or translation start from a higher base because they involve language processing and, in some cases, multiple provider calls.
pricingTransparency.futureBody: Today the product still uses Free and Pro plans, but the pricing philosophy already aims at fairer usage: easier tasks should consume less balance than expensive ones. That is the foundation for future recharge flexibility.
pricingTransparency.faq1q: Will I always know the cost in advance?
pricingTransparency.faq1a: For supported heavy and AI tools, Dociva can show a pre-run quote before dispatch. Simpler tools keep a fixed credit cost.
pricingTransparency.faq2q: What happens when my balance is too low?
pricingTransparency.faq2a: The task is rejected before processing starts, so you can review your balance or upgrade without spending credits blindly.
pricingTransparency.faq3q: Why not price everything as one transaction?
pricingTransparency.faq3a: A flat transaction count is easier to explain but less fair. Workload-aware pricing helps keep simple tools affordable without underpricing expensive jobs.

faq.q: Can I edit text in a PDF?
faq.a: Yes. You can add new text boxes and visually edit the text elements you place in the editor. Support for deeper editing of existing PDF text is being expanded carefully.

faq.q: Is the PDF editor free?
faq.a: Yes, the online PDF editor is available directly in your browser without installing desktop software.

faq.q: Will the original PDF be changed?
faq.a: No. The tool creates a new edited PDF copy, while your original file remains untouched.

pdfFlowchart.whatItDoes: Upload a PDF containing procedures and workflows, and our AI automatically analyzes the content to generate interactive flowcharts. Visualize step-by-step processes, decision points, and workflows as professional diagrams.
howToUse: Upload a PDF with procedures or workflows.
The AI analyzes and detects procedures automatically.
Select which procedures to convert to flowcharts.
View, customize, and export the generated flowcharts.
benefits: Export as PNG, SVG, or PDF
useCases: Visualizing standard operating procedures (SOPs)
Converting training manuals into flowcharts
Analyzing business process documents
Creating visual guides from regulatory procedures
Understanding complex workflows from documentation

faq.q: How does PDF to Flowchart work?
faq.a: Upload a PDF with procedures or workflows, and our AI analyzes the content to generate an interactive flowchart with decision points and process steps.

faq.q: What types of PDFs work best?
faq.a: PDFs containing step-by-step procedures, SOPs, workflows, and process documentation produce the best results.

faq.q: Can I edit the generated flowchart?
faq.a: Yes, you can customize the flowchart and use the built-in AI assistant to suggest improvements.

imageConvert.whatItDoes: Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats instantly. Whether you need a transparent PNG, a compressed JPG, or a modern WebP file, this tool handles the conversion while maintaining image quality.
howToUse: Upload your image file.
Select the target format (JPG, PNG, or WebP).
Click Convert to process the image.
Download your converted image.
benefits: Convert between JPG, PNG, and WebP
useCases: Converting PNG to JPG for smaller email attachments
Converting JPG to PNG for transparent backgrounds
Converting to WebP for faster website loading
Preparing images for specific platform requirements
Converting screenshots to a shareable format

faq.q: What image formats are supported?
faq.a: You can convert between JPG (JPEG), PNG, and WebP formats.

faq.q: Does conversion reduce image quality?
faq.a: No, our converter maintains the original image quality during format conversion.

faq.q: When should I use WebP?
faq.a: Use WebP for web images — it offers the best compression with minimal quality loss, resulting in faster page loads.

imageResize.whatItDoes: Resize images to exact pixel dimensions while maintaining quality. Lock the aspect ratio to prevent distortion, or set custom width and height independently. Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP output formats.
howToUse: Upload your image file.
Enter the target width and/or height in pixels.
Toggle aspect ratio lock if needed.
Download your resized image.
benefits: Works with JPG, PNG, and WebP
useCases: Resizing photos for social media profiles
Preparing images for website thumbnails
Meeting exact dimension requirements for online forms
Reducing image dimensions for faster loading
Creating consistent sizes for product catalogs

faq.q: How do I resize an image?
faq.a: Upload your image, enter the desired width and/or height, and download the resized image. Toggle aspect ratio lock to maintain proportions.

faq.q: Can I maintain the aspect ratio?
faq.a: Yes, lock the aspect ratio so the image resizes proportionally — enter one dimension and the other calculates automatically.

faq.q: What is the maximum output size?
faq.a: You can resize images to any reasonable dimension. The tool works best with standard web and print sizes.

compressImage.whatItDoes: Reduce image file size while maintaining visual quality. Our compressor optimizes your images for web use, email attachments, and storage efficiency. Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP formats.
howToUse: Upload your image file (PNG, JPG, or WebP).
Adjust the quality slider to balance size and quality.
Click Compress to process the image.
Download the compressed image.
useCases: Optimizing images for website performance
Reducing image size for email attachments
Compressing photos for cloud storage
Preparing images for social media uploads
Reducing bandwidth usage for mobile apps

faq.q: How does image compression work?
faq.a: Our tool reduces file size by optimizing encoding and removing unnecessary metadata while preserving visual quality.

faq.q: Which format compresses best?
faq.a: WebP typically achieves the best compression, followed by JPG for photographs and PNG for graphics with transparency.

faq.q: How much can I reduce the file size?
faq.a: Depending on the image and quality setting, you can typically reduce file size by 30-80%.

removeBg.whatItDoes: Remove image backgrounds automatically using AI. Upload any photo and our machine learning model accurately detects the subject, removing the background and producing a transparent PNG image in seconds.
howToUse: Upload your image file.
The AI automatically detects the subject.
Click Remove Background to process.
Download the transparent PNG image.
benefits: Works with photos, products, and portraits
useCases: Creating product photos for e-commerce
Removing backgrounds from profile pictures
Preparing images for graphic design projects
Making transparent logos or icons
Creating cutouts for social media content

faq.q: How does background removal work?
faq.a: Our AI model automatically detects the subject in your image and removes the background, producing a transparent PNG file.

faq.q: What types of images work best?
faq.a: The tool works best with clear subjects — product photos, portraits, and objects with distinct edges.

faq.q: What format is the output?
faq.a: The output is always a PNG file with a transparent background.

imageToSvg.whatItDoes: Convert raster images (PNG, JPG, WebP) to scalable SVG vector format. Whether you need vector logos, icons, or illustrations, this tool traces the image paths and produces a clean SVG that scales to any size without pixelation.
howToUse: Upload your image file (PNG, JPG, or WebP).
Choose the tracing mode: Full Color or Black & White.
Click Convert to SVG to start processing.
Download your scalable SVG vector file.
benefits: Convert PNG, JPG, and WebP to SVG
Editable in vector editors (Illustrator, Figma, Inkscape)
useCases: Converting logos to scalable vector format
Creating SVG icons for websites and apps
Vectorizing illustrations for print materials
Preparing graphics for responsive web design
Converting line art or diagrams to editable paths

faq.q: What image formats can I convert to SVG?
faq.a: You can convert PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP images to SVG vector format.

faq.q: What is the difference between Color and Black & White mode?
faq.a: Color mode preserves the full color palette of your image. Black & White mode converts to monochrome first, producing cleaner and simpler vector paths — ideal for logos and line art.

faq.q: Can I edit the resulting SVG?
faq.a: Yes, the output SVG contains vector paths that can be edited in any vector graphics editor.

faq.q: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a: Images up to 10 MB are supported. For best results, use clear images under 4000×4000 pixels.

ocr.whatItDoes: Extract text from images and scanned PDF documents using Optical Character Recognition (OCR). Our Tesseract-powered engine supports English, Arabic, and French text recognition with high accuracy.
howToUse: Choose the source type: Image or PDF.
Upload your file.
Select the OCR language (English, Arabic, or French).
Click Extract Text and copy the result.
benefits: Works with images and scanned PDFs
High accuracy with Tesseract OCR engine
Copy extracted text with one click
useCases: Digitizing scanned paper documents
Extracting text from screenshots
Converting image-based PDFs to searchable text
Transcribing text from photos
Extracting data from receipts or invoices

faq.q: What is OCR?
faq.a: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) is a technology that converts images of text into editable, searchable text data.

faq.q: What languages are supported?
faq.a: We currently support English, Arabic, and French for text recognition.

faq.q: Can I OCR a scanned PDF?
faq.a: Yes, you can upload scanned PDF documents and extract text from all pages.

faq.q: How accurate is the OCR?
faq.a: Accuracy depends on image quality. Clear, high-resolution images with good contrast produce the best results.

pdfToExcel.whatItDoes: Convert tables in PDF documents to editable Excel spreadsheets (XLSX). The tool detects tabular data in your PDF and extracts it into a structured Excel file, preserving rows, columns, and data accuracy.
howToUse: Upload a PDF containing tables.
The tool automatically detects table structures.
Wait for the conversion to complete.
Download your Excel spreadsheet (XLSX).
useCases: Converting financial reports from PDF to Excel
Extracting data tables from research papers
Making PDF invoices editable for accounting
Importing PDF data into spreadsheet analysis
Converting government or agency statistics into editable format

faq.q: How do I convert a PDF to Excel?
faq.a: Upload your PDF containing tables. Our tool detects and extracts the tabular data, converting it into an editable Excel spreadsheet.

faq.q: Does it work with scanned PDFs?
faq.a: The tool works best with digitally-created PDFs. For scanned documents, use our OCR tool first to extract text.

faq.q: What if my PDF has multiple tables?
faq.a: All detected tables are extracted and included in the Excel output file.

htmlToPdf.whatItDoes: Convert HTML files into professional PDF documents with full CSS styling support. Our converter renders your HTML with fonts, colors, layouts, and media queries, producing a print-ready PDF.
howToUse: Upload your HTML file.
The converter renders the HTML with CSS support.
Wait for the PDF generation to complete.
Download your professional PDF document.
useCases: Creating PDF versions of web pages
Archiving web content as PDF documents
Generating PDF reports from HTML templates
Converting email newsletters to PDF
Saving styled web documents for offline access

faq.q: How do I convert HTML to PDF?
faq.a: Upload your HTML file and our converter will render it with full CSS support and produce a professional PDF document.

faq.q: Are CSS styles preserved?
faq.a: Yes, our converter supports CSS styling including fonts, colors, layouts, and media queries.

faq.q: Can I convert a web page URL?
faq.a: Currently, you need to upload an HTML file. Save the web page as HTML first, then upload it.

chatPdf.whatItDoes: Have a conversation with your PDF document using AI. Ask questions about the content and get accurate, context-aware answers. Perfect for quickly understanding long documents without reading every page.
howToUse: Upload your PDF document.
Type a question about the document content.
Get an AI-powered answer based on the PDF.
Continue asking follow-up questions as needed.
useCases: Quickly understanding research papers
Finding specific information in long contracts
Getting summaries of sections within a document
Asking about data points in reports
Studying textbooks more efficiently

faq.q: How does Chat with PDF work?
faq.a: Upload your PDF and type a question. Our AI reads the document content and provides accurate answers based on what is in the document.

faq.q: Can it answer questions in other languages?
faq.a: Yes, the AI responds in the same language you use for your question.

faq.q: Is my document kept private?
faq.a: Yes, your document is processed securely and automatically deleted after the session.

summarizePdf.whatItDoes: Get an AI-generated summary of your PDF document in seconds. Choose your preferred summary length — short, medium, or detailed — to get the key points without reading the entire document.
howToUse: Upload your PDF document.
Select the summary length: Short, Medium, or Detailed.
Click summarize to generate the summary.
Read the AI-generated summary of your document.
useCases: Getting quick overviews of long reports
Summarizing academic papers for study
Reviewing meeting minutes or transcripts
Understanding legal documents quickly
Previewing documents before a full read

faq.q: How does PDF summarization work?
faq.a: Upload your PDF and choose a summary length. Our AI analyzes the full document and generates a concise summary covering the main points.

faq.q: What summary lengths are available?
faq.a: Short (2-3 sentences), Medium (1-2 paragraphs), or Detailed (comprehensive coverage of all key points).

faq.q: Can it summarize in other languages?
faq.a: The summary is generated in the document's primary language.

translatePdf.whatItDoes: Translate the content of your PDF documents to any language using AI. The translation preserves the meaning and context of the original text while providing natural, fluent output in the target language.
howToUse: Upload your PDF document.
Select the target language for translation.
Click Translate to process the document.
Read or download the translated content.
useCases: Translating foreign-language research papers
Understanding documents received in another language
Preparing multilingual versions of business documents
Translating legal or medical documents for review
Making educational materials accessible in other languages

faq.q: How do I translate a PDF?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, select the target language, and our AI will translate the content while maintaining the original meaning and context.

faq.q: What languages are supported?
faq.a: You can translate to and from virtually any language including English, Arabic, French, Spanish, German, Chinese, and many more.

faq.q: How accurate is the translation?
faq.a: Our AI produces high-quality translations that preserve context and meaning. For critical documents, we recommend professional review.

tableExtractor.whatItDoes: Detect and extract tables from PDF documents into structured, readable data. View headers and rows in an organized format. Perfect for analyzing tabular information locked inside PDF files.
howToUse: Upload a PDF containing tables.
The tool scans all pages for table structures.
View the extracted tables with headers and data rows.
Copy or use the structured data as needed.
benefits: Automatic table detection across all pages
Structured data view with headers and rows
useCases: Extracting data from financial reports
Analyzing statistical tables in research papers
Pulling product data from PDF catalogs
Reviewing tabular information in government documents
Extracting class schedules or timetables

faq.q: How does table extraction work?
faq.a: Upload a PDF and our tool automatically detects tables on each page, extracting headers and data into a structured view.

faq.q: Can I export extracted tables?
faq.a: The extracted data is displayed in a structured format. For Excel export, use our PDF to Excel tool.

faq.q: What if tables span multiple pages?
faq.a: The tool extracts tables on each page independently. Multi-page spanning tables are detected on each page they appear.

qrCode.whatItDoes: Generate QR codes from any text, URL, or data instantly. Customize the size of the QR code and download it as a high-quality PNG image. Perfect for marketing materials, business cards, and sharing links.
howToUse: Enter your text, URL, or any data.
Select the desired QR code size.
The QR code generates in real-time.
Download the QR code as PNG.
benefits: Generate from any text or URL
useCases: Creating QR codes for website URLs
Adding QR codes to business cards
Generating QR codes for Wi-Fi credentials
Creating scannable links for marketing flyers
Making QR codes for event tickets or invitations

faq.q: How do I create a QR code?
faq.a: Enter your text or URL, choose the desired size, and the QR code generates instantly. Click download to get the PNG file.

faq.q: What can I encode in a QR code?
faq.a: You can encode any text, URLs, email addresses, phone numbers, Wi-Fi credentials, and more.

faq.q: Is the generated QR code permanent?
faq.a: Yes, the QR code encodes the data directly. Once generated, it works forever — no expiration date.

videoToGif.whatItDoes: Create animated GIFs from video clips. Upload a video file and customize the start time, duration, frame rate, and output width to create the perfect animated GIF.
howToUse: Upload your video file (MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM).
Set the start time and duration.
Adjust frame rate and width.
Download your animated GIF.
benefits: Supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and WebM formats
useCases: Creating GIFs for social media posts
Making animated tutorials from screen recordings
Converting funny video clips to shareable GIFs
Creating product demo animations
Making reaction GIFs from video content

faq.q: How do I create a GIF from a video?
faq.a: Upload a video file, set the start time and duration, choose the quality level, and download your animated GIF.

faq.q: What video formats are supported?
faq.a: Most common formats are supported including MP4, MOV, AVI, and WebM.

faq.q: How long can the GIF be?
faq.a: We recommend keeping GIFs under 15 seconds for best file size and loading performance.

wordCounter.whatItDoes: Analyze a social media draft with backend validation for X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok. The tool returns word and character counts, publishing readiness scores, hashtag guidance, CTA detection, and platform-specific recommendations.
howToUse: Paste your draft into the editor.
Wait for the analyzer to score the post and calculate platform fit.
Review the best-fit platform, remaining character limits, and recommendations.
Revise the draft until each target platform reaches a publish-ready score.
benefits: Counts words, characters, hashtags, mentions, links, and emojis
Responsive interface built for production workflows
useCases: Optimizing SaaS launch posts
Checking thread openers before publishing on X
Adapting one campaign message across several social platforms
Validating Arabic and English captions
Reviewing CTA quality before handing copy to a marketing team

faq.q: What makes this different from a basic word counter?
faq.a: It does more than count words. The backend analyzes structure, hashtags, CTA presence, and character fit against platform rules for X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.

faq.q: Does the tool support Arabic content?
faq.a: Yes. The analyzer supports Arabic and English text, including word counts, hashtags, and sentence boundaries used in social captions.

faq.q: Is there an input limit?
faq.a: Yes. The analyzer accepts up to 20,000 characters per request to protect performance and keep the API responsive.

textCleaner.whatItDoes: Clean up messy text by removing extra spaces, converting text case, and removing Arabic diacritics. Perfect for text copied from PDFs, emails, or web pages that has formatting issues.
howToUse: Type or paste your messy text into the input area.
Choose your cleaning options (remove spaces, change case, etc.).
View the cleaned result in real-time.
Copy the cleaned text with one click.
benefits: Remove extra whitespace and line breaks
Convert case: upper, lower, title, sentence
useCases: Cleaning text copied from PDF documents
Normalizing text from web scraping
Preparing text for data processing
Converting text case for consistent formatting
Removing diacritics from Arabic text for search indexing

faq.q: What does the text cleaner do?
faq.a: It removes extra spaces, normalizes whitespace, converts text case, and cleans up formatting issues common when copying text from various sources.

faq.q: Can I convert text to uppercase?
faq.a: Yes, you can convert to uppercase, lowercase, title case, or sentence case with a single click.

faq.q: Does it support Arabic text?
faq.a: Yes, it includes a special option to remove Arabic diacritics (tashkeel/harakat) from text.

pdfToPptx.whatItDoes: Convert PDF files to PowerPoint presentations. Each page is rendered as a high-quality slide image, preserving the visual layout perfectly.
howToUse: Upload your PDF file.
Wait for the conversion to process.
Download your PPTX presentation.
benefits: Each PDF page becomes a slide
useCases: Turning reports into presentation slides
Repurposing PDF content for meetings
Creating editable presentations from static documents

faq.q: How does PDF to PowerPoint conversion work?
faq.a: Each PDF page is rendered as a high-quality image and placed on its own PowerPoint slide.

faq.q: Can I edit the text in the resulting slides?
faq.a: The slides contain page images. For text editing, convert to Word first.

excelToPdf.whatItDoes: Convert Excel spreadsheets to PDF documents while preserving table formatting, fonts, and layout.
howToUse: Upload your XLSX or XLS file.
Wait for the conversion.
Download the PDF.
useCases: Sharing spreadsheets as non-editable PDFs
Creating printable versions of reports
Archiving financial documents

faq.q: Which Excel formats are supported?
faq.a: Both modern XLSX and legacy XLS formats are fully supported.

faq.q: Are charts preserved?
faq.a: Yes, charts and formatting are preserved in the PDF output.

pptxToPdf.whatItDoes: Convert PowerPoint presentations to PDF format for easy sharing and printing. Preserves slide layout and graphics.
howToUse: Upload your PPTX or PPT file.
Wait for the conversion to complete.
Download the PDF.
useCases: Sharing presentations as PDFs
Creating print-ready slide decks
Archiving presentations

faq.q: Are slide transitions preserved?
faq.a: PDF is static, so transitions and animations are not included, but all visual content is preserved.

faq.q: Can I convert PPT files too?
faq.a: Yes, both PPTX and legacy PPT formats are supported.

signPdf.whatItDoes: Add your signature image to PDF documents without printing. Upload a signature image and place it on any page.
howToUse: Upload your PDF document.
Upload your signature image (PNG or JPG).
Choose the page number.
Download the signed PDF.
useCases: Signing contracts electronically
Adding approval signatures to documents
Signing forms without printing

faq.q: Is this a legal electronic signature?
faq.a: This places a visual signature image. For legally binding digital signatures, certificate-based solutions may be required.

faq.q: What image formats work for signatures?
faq.a: PNG (recommended for transparency) and JPG formats are supported.

cropPdf.whatItDoes: Crop PDF pages by adjusting margins. Remove unwanted whitespace and trim documents to the desired size.
howToUse: Upload your PDF.
Set margin values for each side.
Download the cropped PDF.
useCases: Removing wide margins from scanned documents
Trimming PDFs for better screen reading
Adjusting page sizes for printing

faq.q: What units are the margins in?
faq.a: Margins are specified in PDF points (1 point = 1/72 inch).

faq.q: Can I crop specific pages only?
faq.a: Currently all pages are cropped with the same margins.

flattenPdf.whatItDoes: Flatten PDF forms and annotations, converting interactive elements into static content that cannot be edited.
howToUse: Upload your PDF with forms or annotations.
The tool flattens all interactive elements.
Download the flattened PDF.
useCases: Archiving filled forms
Sending completed forms securely
Reducing file complexity

faq.q: What does flattening mean?
faq.a: Flattening converts interactive elements like form fields and annotations into permanent, non-editable content.

faq.q: Can I undo flattening?
faq.a: No, flattening is permanent. Keep a backup of the original file.

repairPdf.whatItDoes: Repair corrupted or damaged PDF files by re-writing the document structure and recovering readable pages.
howToUse: Upload your corrupted PDF.
The tool attempts to fix the document.
Download the repaired PDF.
useCases: Recovering damaged PDFs from old storage
Fixing PDFs that won't open
Repairing partially downloaded files

faq.q: Can it fix any broken PDF?
faq.a: The tool recovers as many pages as possible. Severely corrupted files may only be partially recoverable.

faq.q: Will the repaired file look the same?
faq.a: In most cases yes, though some complex elements may be simplified during repair.

pdfMetadata.whatItDoes: View and edit PDF document properties including title, author, subject, keywords, and creator information.
howToUse: Upload your PDF.
Fill in the metadata fields you want to change.
Download the updated PDF.
useCases: Setting proper titles for document management
Adding author information
Preparing PDFs for archival systems

faq.q: What is PDF metadata?
faq.a: Metadata includes document properties like title, author, and keywords that help organize and search PDFs.

faq.q: Can I remove all metadata?
faq.a: Yes, leave all fields blank to clear existing metadata.

imageCrop.whatItDoes: Crop images by specifying exact pixel coordinates. Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP formats.
howToUse: Upload your image.
Enter crop coordinates (left, top, right, bottom).
Download the cropped image.
useCases: Trimming product photos
Removing unwanted borders
Creating thumbnails

faq.q: How do coordinates work?
faq.a: Left and top define the starting point, right and bottom define the ending point of the crop area in pixels.

faq.q: What formats are supported?
faq.a: PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WebP are supported.

imageRotateFlip.whatItDoes: Rotate images by 90°, 180°, or 270° and flip them horizontally or vertically. Combine operations in one step.
howToUse: Upload your image.
Choose rotation angle and flip options.
Download the transformed image.
useCases: Fixing photo orientation
Creating mirror images
Adjusting scanned document rotation

faq.q: Can I combine rotation and flip?
faq.a: Yes, rotation and flip are applied together in a single operation.

faq.q: Does rotation affect quality?
faq.a: Rotation is lossless for PNG. JPG quality is preserved as closely as possible.

barcode.whatItDoes: Generate barcodes in various formats including Code128, Code39, EAN-13, UPC-A, ISBN, and more. Download as PNG or SVG.
howToUse: Enter the data to encode.
Select a barcode type.
Choose output format (PNG or SVG).
Generate and download your barcode.
useCases: Generating product barcodes
Creating inventory labels
Producing ISBN barcodes for books

faq.q: What barcode formats are available?
faq.a: Code128, Code39, EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, ISBN-13, ISBN-10, ISSN, and PZN.

faq.q: What is the difference from a QR code?
faq.a: Barcodes are linear (1D) with less data capacity. QR codes are 2D and store more information.
